personalInfo.name: Dhruv Hingol
personalInfo.title: Frontend & React Native Developer
personalInfo.subtitle: Available for Freelance Contract / Retainer
personalInfo.bio: Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience in building responsive and scalable applications. Specializing in React, React Native, and clean UI/UX implementations. Strong track record of launching products from zero to production and optimizing performance speeds (25% boost).

about.title: About Me
bioParagraphs: I am a dedicated frontend and mobile developer with 3+ years of experience in building highly responsive, pixel-perfect, and scalable web and mobile applications. I specialize in launching digital products from zero to production and optimizing web architectures to improve performance (including engineering a 25% speed boost on a live product).
Currently engineering client solutions with modern technologies like React 19, React Native, TypeScript 5.8, and Vite 7.

servicesSection.badge: What I Can Build For You
servicesSection.title: Services & Expertise
servicesSection.description: I specialize in the React and React Native ecosystem to design pixel-perfect, lightning-fast interfaces.

services.title: React Native Mobile Apps
services.description: High-performance iOS & Android applications built with React Native. I build fluid, native-grade mobile apps that offer seamless user experiences, using a single codebase to save you significant launch time and cost.
benefits: Saves 50% development cost using React Native code-sharing
Fluid 60fps animations with React Native Reanimated
Seamless deployment to Apple App Store & Google Play

services.title: SaaS & Web Applications
services.description: Fully responsive and SEO-optimized web applications built using React and Next.js. I design pixel-perfect user interfaces, handle complex client-side state, and optimize performance for the best user experience.
benefits: SEO-friendly pages with Next.js Server-Side Rendering (SSR)
Fluid animations and interactive user dashboards
Optimized Core Web Vitals for faster loading

services.title: UI Implementation & Optimization
services.description: Translating design mockups (Figma, Adobe XD) into high-quality, reusable component structures. I audit bundle sizes, set up code splitting, optimize React rendering behavior, and fix performance bottlenecks.
benefits: Pixel-perfect implementations matching Figma designs exactly
Reduced initial bundle sizes by up to 30% for instant loading
Accessible components conforming to WCAG/WAI-ARIA guidelines

projectsSection.title: Featured Case Studies
projectsSection.description: Interactive web applications and technical solutions built for local businesses and Chrome users.
projectsSection.moreProjectsText: Need to see more specific examples? View my code repositories on

projects.name: Heptaverse-FE
projects.description: Architected a production-ready B2B platform under tight launch deadlines, managing features end-to-end.
achievements: Led remote frontend alignment and development in a distributed team, accelerating feature release cycles
Spearheaded performance optimizations using Zustand and React Query, cutting client-side load times
Autonomously built complex B2B client interfaces using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI with zero supervision
Dockerized frontend environments and built automated CI/CD pipelines, removing manual release bottlenecks

projects.name: Jalsa Bitez
projects.subtitle: Boutique Cafe & Bakery Web Application
projects.description: Designed and developed a premium responsive website for a boutique cafe & bakery with custom CSS animations and particle-based loading states.
projects.challenge: Local boutique cafes struggle to compete with large chain establishments due to a lack of a premium, engaging online brand presence, and integrated local food ordering solutions.
projects.solution: Engineered a high-end, responsive crimson-themed web application utilizing custom CSS animations for layout transitions. Designed a custom particle-based canvas splash screen to captivate site visitors on load and integrated online partner links (Zomato/Swiggy) with fully responsive contact forms for custom local catering bookings.
projects.results: Significantly increased average session duration and reduced bounce rates. The bespoke animations and branding established an immediate high-end visual footprint, boosting customer trust and driving local catering inquiries.
achievements: Developed a premium responsive landing page featuring smooth keyframe animations and a radial glow color scheme matching the cafe's crimson-gold branding
Engineered an interactive, particle-based splash loading screen to engage visitors and reduce bounce rates
Integrated responsive contact/feedback forms and online ordering badges (Zomato/Swiggy) for local customers

projects.name: Empowering Fitness
projects.subtitle: Premium Gym & Fitness Center Web Application
projects.description: Created a comprehensive responsive web application for a premium gym & fitness center featuring interactive timetables and health calculators.
projects.challenge: Fitness centers experience high drop-off rates on marketing sites if class timetables are static or difficult to browse, and if clients are unable to calculate their energy targets or health scores interactively.
projects.solution: Developed a responsive, feature-rich web application containing client-side interactive calculators for BMI scores, TDEE (BMR calorie maintenance metrics), and target daily hydration levels. Engineered a dynamic weekly class timetable schedule with tabbed active day filters, utilizing glassmorphic layouts and smooth transitions.
projects.results: Successfully raised average page visitor retention times. The calculators provided direct interactive value, resulting in a spike in membership plan inquiries submitted through the contact section.
achievements: Designed and built interactive client-side calculators for BMI score tracking, BMR (calorie maintenance), and daily hydration targets
Created an interactive weekly class schedule timetable with active day filtering to simplify class time planning
Optimized responsive layout components and modern glassmorphic panels for performance and high-density screen display

projects.name: RenCoach
projects.description: Owned development of complex client-side portals, operating with high autonomy and direct communication.
achievements: Optimized frontend data storage and caching to reduce costly API traffic by 25%
Boosted page performance by 20% within weeks through aggressive lazy loading and assets cleanup
Translated business wireframes into functional, production-ready code with weekly client demos

projects.name: Bizzmitr
projects.description: Collaborated remotely to migrate legacy pages to high-performance Next.js architectures.
achievements: Autonomously set up code splitting and lazy loading structures, slashing initial bundle sizes
Optimized Next.js Server-Side Rendering (SSR) to boost SEO rankings and speed up indexing
Independently managed tasks and deadlines in a fully remote setup, maintaining high delivery speed

projects.name: React Native App
projects.description: Engineered a cross-platform mobile application for dealer inventory and purchasing.
achievements: Designed and implemented live product syncing and real-time purchasing logs via REST APIs
Developed cross-platform mobile builds in record time, allowing early client testing
Configured robust local database storage to ensure app utility during offline client visits

projects.name: Ariel AI
projects.description: Built interactive AI features, cooperating with AI engineers to deploy streaming feedback loops.
achievements: Created modern, responsive user interfaces with custom UI libraries and Tailwind CSS
Implemented real-time visual feedback loops and streaming text states for AI interactions
Iterated rapidly in fast-paced sprint cycles based on direct stakeholder and user feedback

projects.name: Aegis Tracker
projects.subtitle: Privacy-First Productivity Extension (React)
projects.challenge: Productivity tracking tools usually require sending private user browser activity logs to external servers, violating user privacy and corporate security compliance.
projects.solution: Created a highly secure Chrome Extension utilizing React 19 and Vite with 100% client-side local storage and smart browser idle state detection algorithms.
projects.results: Deployed to the Chrome Web Store and secured 5,000+ active weekly users with zero server data transmissions. Visualized user activity metrics locally using Recharts charts.

contactSection.title: Start Your Project
contactSection.description: Ready to turn your idea into a functional product? Tell me about it below and let's build together.

whyWorkWithMe.title: Why work with me?
points: End-to-end support from cloud setup to App Stores
